description_long: This house features a rectangular structure with white brick-textured walls and a pitched, terracotta-tiled gable roof. A prominent chimney, finished in a white stone pattern, rises from one side of the roof. The roof tiles are arranged in neat, horizontal rows, giving a classic, Mediterranean-inspired appearance. Only one visible entry door, dark brown and paneled, is present on one side of the house, while no windows are apparent on any facade. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, suitable for a suburban or rural neighborhood.
description: A single-story, white brick house with a terracotta-tiled gable roof and a prominent chimney, featuring a single dark entry door and no visible windows.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the narrow end, showing the gable roof, white brick wall, and the chimney on the left side.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the full expanse of the terracotta-tiled roof and the chimney at the far left.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end of the house, showing the gable roof and chimney on the right, with no visible door or windows.
description_view_3: A side view displaying the long white brick wall, the full length of the tiled roof, the chimney at the far end, and a single dark entry door.
attribute_entryway_design: Single dark paneled door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements
